item.title: Data Recovery Utility [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Data Recovery Utility [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoveryutility
item.itunes:summary:
Data Recovery Utility
(Utilities)
Advance data recovery program provides facility to restore corrupted data and file from your computer system. Data Recovery Utility is fully capable to recover music file, picture from storage devices that erased due to virus detection. www.datadoctor.co.in has ability to restore important missing files and folder from pc. Advance data recovery software is capable to recover deleted valuable details and other type of system information in minimum time of interval. Download data recovery application provides facility to restore missing file and folder from hard disk. Free download data recovery program has capability to retrieve deleted photo, mp3 songs, picture and images from digital camera. Data recovery software is used to restore different type of files/ folder that permanently deleted from storage drives. Advance data recovery application allows recovering erased contact number and important massages for your mobile phone inbox. Free download data recovery program enables to restore file and folder that delete from your computer system due to power failure. Data recovery tool provides facility to retrieve data and valuable documents from your computer that erased due to virus attack. Download data recovery application helps to restore important information and valuable documents from portable storage devices. Free download data recovery software provides facility to recover data from your system that erased during system partitioning. Advance data recovery program has ability to restore different type of deleted file and folders from pen drive. Feature:- *Download data recovery application restores corrupted data and files from portable storage devices. *Advance data recovery software easily recover deleted all type of important information from your pc. *Data recovery program retrieves missing music file, audio/ video song, images and picture from hard disk. *Free download data recovery tool easily restore files/folders permanently deleted from memory card.

[read more]

Data Recovery Utility
(Utilities)
Advance data recovery program provides facility to restore corrupted data and file from your computer system. Data Recovery Utility is fully capable to recover music file, picture from storage devices that erased due to virus detection. www.datadoctor.co.in has ability to restore important missing files and folder from pc. Advance data recovery software is capable to recover deleted valuable details and other type of system information in minimum time of interval. [read more]

Data Recovery Utility
(Utilities)
Advance data recovery program provides facility to restore corrupted data and file from your computer system. Data Recovery Utility is fully capable to recover music file, picture from storage devices that erased due to virus detection. www.datadoctor.co.in has ability to restore important missing files and folder from pc. Advance data recovery software is capable to recover deleted valuable details and other type of system information in minimum time of interval. Download data recovery application provides facility to restore missing file and folder from hard disk. Free download data recovery program has capability to retrieve deleted photo, mp3 songs, picture and images from digital camera. Data recovery software is used to restore different type of files/ folder that permanently deleted from storage drives. Advance data recovery application allows recovering erased contact number and important massages for your mobile phone inbox. Free download data recovery program enables to restore file and folder that delete from your computer system due to power failure. Data recovery tool provides facility to retrieve data and valuable documents from your computer that erased due to virus attack. Download data recovery application helps to restore important information and valuable documents from portable storage devices. Free download data recovery software provides facility to recover data from your system that erased during system partitioning. Advance data recovery program has ability to restore different type of deleted file and folders from pen drive. Feature:- *Download data recovery application restores corrupted data and files from portable storage devices. *Advance data recovery software easily recover deleted all type of important information from your pc. *Data recovery program retrieves missing music file, audio/ video song, images and picture from hard disk. *Free download data recovery tool easily restore files/folders permanently deleted from memory card.

[read more]

item.title: Barcode Image Maker Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Barcode Image Maker Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoveryutility
item.itunes:summary:
Barcode Image Maker Software
(Utilities)
Download barcode label creator application to create bar code images of customized resolution of various ranges. Professional barcode image creator tool is used for several organizations whose key products are identification cards, video tape labels, CD labels, food products, price marking, pharmaceutical products etc. Barcode image creator wizard allows you to fully customize bar code Caption colour, Caption font, Barcode colour, Background colour and Barcode size of the created barcode labels. Bar code symbol creator utility can easily print generated output using normal printers, so its necessary for users to go for thermal printers or barcode printers. Barcode printer software is reliable in generating printable barcode label, asset tags or stickers with support to all major barcode font standards including Interleaved 2of5, Code 39, Code 11, UCC128, CODE128, EAN13, EAN8, IND25, POSTNET, UPCA, UPCE, PLANET and MSI PLESSEY, Codabar, Code 93 etc. Barcode generation solution comes with interactive graphical user interface and supports all windows operating systems such as Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8. 2D barcode creator utility can save barcode image common graphics formats such as BMP, JPEG, GIF and TIF. Features: *Barcode labeling program can generate several bar code images at once, so it can be used in several industries where workload of manual data entry is too high. *Generated result can be saving in commonly used file formats. *Utility is available with many customizable modes, so that user can edit barcode to several extents. *Tool is interactive and comes with help manual, which demonstrates it easily.

[read more]
item.description:
Barcode Image Maker Software

Download barcode label creator application to create bar code images of customized resolution of various ranges. Professional barcode image creator tool is used for several organizations whose key products are identification cards, video tape labels, CD labels, food products, price marking, pharmaceutical products etc. Barcode image creator wizard allows you to fully customize bar code Caption colour, Caption font, Barcode colour, Background colour and Barcode size of the created barcode labels. [read more]

item.title: GODSPEED NRFO [Virtualization]
item.itunes:title: GODSPEED NRFO [Virtualization]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GODSPEED NRFO
(Virtualization)
[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[h2][color=#FF0000] NO ROOT FULL OPTIMIZATION [/color][color=#008000] NRFO [/color][/h2]
[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[h3] [b] COMBO [/b] [/h3]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/2068290/]1.Fix aim boost [/url]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/2056054/]2.GSM NOROR [/url]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/2040463/]3.GAME SPACE [/url]
[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[h3] [b]SUPPORT[/b] [/h3]
[url=https://godtspeed.xyz]Click here to visit GoDTspeed[/url]

[url=https://t.me/godTspeed]Join Official Channel[/url]

[url=https://t.me/godTspeed]Official Group to Share Your Problem[/url]

[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[h3][b] FIND MORE PROJECT FROM ☞ [/h3] [/b] [url=https://www.pling.com/u/revwhiteshadow] @revWhiteShadow [/url]
[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]




"NO ROOT FULL OPTIMIZATION" (NRFO), a cutting-edge optimizer developed by revWhiteShadow specifically designed to enhance the gaming experience on non-rooted Android devices.

NRFO is a revolutionary solution that eliminates the need for rooting your device while still delivering exceptional performance improvements. With NRFO, gamers can unlock the full potential of their Android devices, allowing them to play demanding games smoothly, without any lag or slowdowns.

By implementing advanced optimization techniques, NRFO intelligently manages system resources, fine-tuning various parameters to ensure optimal performance during gameplay. It optimizes CPU usage, prioritizes gaming processes, and minimizes background tasks, resulting in reduced system load and increased frame rates.

NRFO also provides additional features tailored for gaming enthusiasts. It offers a dedicated Game Mode that maximizes device performance by disabling unnecessary services and notifications, providing an immersive gaming environment. Moreover, NRFO includes a Game Turbo feature that further boosts gaming performance by optimizing graphics settings and reducing input lag.

With NRFO, non-rooted Android users can enjoy a seamless and immersive gaming experience on their devices, previously thought to be limited to rooted devices. It empowers gamers to play their favorite games at their full potential, ensuring smooth gameplay, faster loading times, and an overall enhanced gaming experience.

Revolutionize your non-rooted Android gaming experience with NRFO and unlock the true gaming potential of your device. Get ready to embark on gaming adventures like never before!

[h2]Linux Installation[/h2]

Unzip the ZIP File:
unzip
Navigate to the Extracted Folder:

cd extracted_folder
Run the Installer:

For 32-bit systems:
./
For 64-bit systems:
./

[h2]Windows Installation[/h2]
Extract the zip:
Use a tool like WinRAR, 7-Zip, or the built-in Windows tool to extract the contents of the APK file.
Open Command Prompt:

Press Win + R, type cmd, and press Enter.
Run the Installer:

For 32-bit systems:
bash
For 64-bit systems:
bash

[h2]Android Installation / BlissOS / Other Emulator Installation[/h2]
Open Magisk / Kernel SU:

Ensure you have Magisk or Kernel SU installed on your device or emulator.
Go to the Module Section:

Open the Magisk app and navigate to the Modules section.
Select the Module from Storage:

Tap on "Select from Storage" and choose the previously downloaded file.
Install the Module:

After selecting the file, press "OK". The module will install itself.
Reboot the Device:

Once the installation is complete, reboot your device to finalize the installation.

[h2]Virtualisation Installation[/h2]
Step 1: Open LDPlayer,android studio or other simulation
Ensure LDPlayer, an Android emulator, is installed on your computer. Open LDPlayer to begin the process.

Step 2: Follow Android Installation
Within LDPlayer, follow the steps outlined in the Android Installation section:

Open Magisk or KernelSU within the emulator.
Navigate to the Modules section.
Select the module from storage.
Install the module.
Reboot the virtual device within LDPlayer.

[h2]Shizuku or ADB NRFO INSTALLATION [/h2]

1. extract the NRFO.zip file in sdcard

2. run shizuku
sh /sdcard/NRFO/rish

3.Paste Following command

rm -rf /data/local/tmp/* && cp /sdcard/NRFO/NRFO /data/local/tmp && chmod +x /data/local/tmp/NRFO && /data/local/tmp/NRFO

*32 BIT

rm -rf /data/local/tmp/* && cp /sdcard/NRFO/NRFO32 /data/local/tmp && chmod +x /data/local/tmp/NRFO32 && /data/local/tmp/NRFO32

*to uninstall just reboot

[read more]

NRFO is a revolutionary solution that eliminates the need for rooting your device while still delivering exceptional performance improvements. With NRFO, gamers can unlock the full potential of their Android devices, allowing them to play demanding games smoothly, without any lag or slowdowns.

By implementing advanced optimization techniques, NRFO intelligently manages system resources, fine-tuning various parameters to ensure optimal performance during gameplay. It optimizes CPU usage, prioritizes gaming processes, and minimizes background tasks, resulting in reduced system load and increased frame rates.

NRFO also provides additional features tailored for gaming enthusiasts. It offers a dedicated Game Mode that maximizes device performance by disabling unnecessary services and notifications, providing an immersive gaming environment. Moreover, NRFO includes a Game Turbo feature that further boosts gaming performance by optimizing graphics settings and reducing input lag.

With NRFO, non-rooted Android users can enjoy a seamless and immersive gaming experience on their devices, previously thought to be limited to rooted devices. It empowers gamers to play their favorite games at their full potential, ensuring smooth gameplay, faster loading times, and an overall enhanced gaming experience.

Revolutionize your non-rooted Android gaming experience with NRFO and unlock the true gaming potential of your device. Get ready to embark on gaming adventures like never before!

[h2]Linux Installation[/h2]

Unzip the ZIP File:
unzip
Navigate to the Extracted Folder:

cd extracted_folder
Run the Installer:

For 32-bit systems:
./
For 64-bit systems:
./

[h2]Windows Installation[/h2]
Extract the zip:
Use a tool like WinRAR, 7-Zip, or the built-in Windows tool to extract the contents of the APK file.
Open Command Prompt:

Press Win + R, type cmd, and press Enter.
Run the Installer:

For 32-bit systems:
bash
For 64-bit systems:
bash

[h2]Android Installation / BlissOS / Other Emulator Installation[/h2]
Open Magisk / Kernel SU:

Ensure you have Magisk or Kernel SU installed on your device or emulator.
Go to the Module Section:

Open the Magisk app and navigate to the Modules section.
Select the Module from Storage:

Tap on "Select from Storage" and choose the previously downloaded file.
Install the Module:

After selecting the file, press "OK". The module will install itself.
Reboot the Device:

Once the installation is complete, reboot your device to finalize the installation.

sh /sdcard/NRFO/rish

rm -rf /data/local/tmp/* && cp /sdcard/NRFO/NRFO /data/local/tmp && chmod +x /data/local/tmp/NRFO && /data/local/tmp/NRFO

Use a tool like WinRAR, 7-Zip, or the built-in Windows tool to extract the contents of the APK file.
Open Command Prompt:

Press Win + R, type cmd, and press Enter.
Run the Installer:

For 32-bit systems:
bash
For 64-bit systems:
bash

[h2]Android Installation / BlissOS / Other Emulator Installation[/h2]
Open Magisk / Kernel SU:

Ensure you have Magisk or Kernel SU installed on your device or emulator.
Go to the Module Section:

Open the Magisk app and navigate to the Modules section.
Select the Module from Storage:

Tap on "Select from Storage" and choose the previously downloaded file.
Install the Module:

After selecting the file, press "OK". The module will install itself.
Reboot the Device:

Once the installation is complete, reboot your device to finalize the installation.

[h2]Virtualisation Installation[/h2]
Step 1: Open LDPlayer,android studio or other simulation
Ensure LDPlayer, an Android emulator, is installed on your computer. Open LDPlayer to begin the process.

Step 2: Follow Android Installation
Within LDPlayer, follow the steps outlined in the Android Installation section:

Open Magisk or KernelSU within the emulator.
Navigate to the Modules section.
Select the module from storage.
Install the module.
Reboot the virtual device within LDPlayer.

[h2]Shizuku or ADB NRFO INSTALLATION [/h2]

1. extract the NRFO.zip file in sdcard

2. run shizuku
sh /sdcard/NRFO/rish

3.Paste Following command

rm -rf /data/local/tmp/* && cp /sdcard/NRFO/NRFO /data/local/tmp && chmod +x /data/local/tmp/NRFO && /data/local/tmp/NRFO

*32 BIT

rm -rf /data/local/tmp/* && cp /sdcard/NRFO/NRFO32 /data/local/tmp && chmod +x /data/local/tmp/NRFO32 && /data/local/tmp/NRFO32

*to uninstall just reboot

[read more]

item.title: Yang YouTube Downloader [Video Converters]
item.itunes:title: Yang YouTube Downloader [Video Converters]
item.itunes:author: hanuman
item.itunes:summary:
Yang YouTube Downloader
(Video Converters)
Yet another YouTube downloader? Most downloaders do not give the best quality as they choose the wrong streams and re-encode them.
This downloader allows you to get either the MP4 or VP9 videos, and the AAC or Opus audios, without re-encoding to preserve the best quality. While VP9 is 35% more efficient than MP4 for videos, some videos have 40-60% smaller file sizes in VP9 format! It will automatically select the best-quality video based on file sizes. It can even combine MP4 videos with Opus audios in a MKV file, although not all players will support it. I haven't seen any other downloader that can produce a MKV file with the best video and audio without re-encoding anything.

Supports Windows (Win 7 SP1 or later), Linux (all distros) and MacOS (10.15 or later)

Installation instructions
https://github.com/mysteryx93/HanumanInstituteApps/wiki/Yang-YouTube-Downloader

From Etienne Charland aka Hanuman, by a lightworker in his free time.
https://www.spiritualselftransformation.com/
[read more]
item.description:
Yang YouTube Downloader
(Video Converters)
Yet another YouTube downloader? Most downloaders do not give the best quality as they choose the wrong streams and re-encode them.
This downloader allows you to get either the MP4 or VP9 videos, and the AAC or Opus audios, without re-encoding to preserve the best quality. While VP9 is 35% more efficient than MP4 for videos, some videos have 40-60% smaller file sizes in VP9 format! It will automatically select the best-quality video based on file sizes. It can even combine MP4 videos with Opus audios in a MKV file, although not all players will support it. https://www.spiritualselftransformation.com/
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Yang YouTube Downloader
(Video Converters)
Yet another YouTube downloader? Most downloaders do not give the best quality as they choose the wrong streams and re-encode them.
This downloader allows you to get either the MP4 or VP9 videos, and the AAC or Opus audios, without re-encoding to preserve the best quality. While VP9 is 35% more efficient than MP4 for videos, some videos have 40-60% smaller file sizes in VP9 format! It will automatically select the best-quality video based on file sizes. It can even combine MP4 videos with Opus audios in a MKV file, although not all players will support it. I haven't seen any other downloader that can produce a MKV file with the best video and audio without re-encoding anything.

Supports Windows (Win 7 SP1 or later), Linux (all distros) and MacOS (10.15 or later)

Installation instructions

From Etienne Charland aka Hanuman, by a lightworker in his free time.

[read more]

item.title: Powerliminals Player [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:title: Powerliminals Player [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:author: hanuman
item.itunes:summary:
Powerliminals Player
(Audioplayers)
Plays Powerliminal audios, which are nearly-silent audios containing very high-frequency energies to play in the background. You can stack 10 to 30 audios at varying speeds to play in the background day and night, selecting the balance of energies that you need.
https://www.spiritualselftransformation.com/powerliminals-nonrivalry

Here's a free Powerliminal on YouTube. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jdcWwWM6hQg

I can play 25 audios with ~3% CPU usage.

Supports Windows (Win 7 SP1 or later) and Linux (all distros).

Installation instructions
https://github.com/mysteryx93/HanumanInstituteApps/wiki/Powerliminals-Player

From Etienne Charland aka Hanuman, by a lightworker in his free time.
https://www.spiritualselftransformation.com
[read more]

Here's a free Powerliminal on YouTube. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jdcWwWM6hQg

item.title: 432Hz Batch Converter [Audio Extractors/Converters]
item.itunes:title: 432Hz Batch Converter [Audio Extractors/Converters]
item.itunes:author: hanuman
item.itunes:summary:
432Hz Batch Converter
(Audio Extractors/Converters)
Most music is recorded in 440Hz. Many people claim that 432Hz resonates more with the heart whereas 440Hz resonates more with the brain, and that 432Hz music feels better. Try it yourself. Play a music in 440Hz and in 432Hz, and see which one you prefer. Most people choose the 432Hz version, and it's hard to go back to 440Hz.
This application re-encodes your audio files while shifting the pitch to 432hz. It uses a very high-quality pitch-shifting algorithm.

Supports Windows (Win 7 SP1 or later), Linux (all distros) and MacOS (10.15 or later)

Installation instructions
https://github.com/mysteryx93/HanumanInstituteApps/wiki/432hz-Batch-Converter

From Etienne Charland aka Hanuman, by a lightworker in his free time.
https://www.spiritualselftransformation.com/
[read more]
item.description:
432Hz Batch Converter
(Audio Extractors/Converters)
Most music is recorded in 440Hz. Many people claim that 432Hz resonates more with the heart whereas 440Hz resonates more with the brain, and that 432Hz music feels better. Try it yourself. Play a music in 440Hz and in 432Hz, and see which one you prefer. Most people choose the 432Hz version, and it's hard to go back to 440Hz.
This application re-encodes your audio files while shifting the pitch to 432hz. It uses a very high-quality pitch-shifting algorithm.

Supports Windows (Win 7 SP1 or later), Linux (all distros) and MacOS (10.15 or later)

[read more]

432Hz Batch Converter
(Audio Extractors/Converters)
Most music is recorded in 440Hz. Many people claim that 432Hz resonates more with the heart whereas 440Hz resonates more with the brain, and that 432Hz music feels better. Try it yourself. Play a music in 440Hz and in 432Hz, and see which one you prefer. Most people choose the 432Hz version, and it's hard to go back to 440Hz.
This application re-encodes your audio files while shifting the pitch to 432hz. It uses a very high-quality pitch-shifting algorithm.

Supports Windows (Win 7 SP1 or later), Linux (all distros) and MacOS (10.15 or later)

item.title: 432Hz Player [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:title: 432Hz Player [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:author: hanuman
item.itunes:summary:
432Hz Player
(Audioplayers)
Most music is recorded in 440Hz. Many people claim that 432Hz resonates more with the heart whereas 440Hz resonates more with the brain, and that 432Hz music feels better. Try it yourself. Play a music in 440Hz and in 432Hz, and see which one you prefer. Most people choose the 432Hz version, and it's hard to go back to 440Hz.
This application uses a very high-quality pitch-shifting algorithm with low CPU usage. It also auto-detects the music exact pitch for precise tuning.

Supports Windows (Win 7 SP1 or later), Linux (all distros) and MacOS (10.15 or later)

Installation instructions
https://github.com/mysteryx93/HanumanInstituteApps/wiki/432hz-Player

From Etienne Charland aka Hanuman, by a lightworker in his free time.
https://www.spiritualselftransformation.com/
[read more]

This application uses a very high-quality pitch-shifting algorithm with low CPU usage. It also auto-detects the music exact pitch for precise tuning.

Supports Windows (Win 7 SP1 or later), Linux (all distros) and MacOS (10.15 or later)
